opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Running agents directly within the OS is compelling, but be wary of sandboxing challenges; full isolation is surprisingly difficult to achieve and impacts performance. The agent's cognitive architecture—how it reasons and plans—will be the primary determinant of its overall utility, far more than just the underlying LLM. Consider a hierarchical planning approach early on to manage complexity.
actions.reasoning: My work centers on building AI agents and the underlying infrastructure for them, including routing, orchestration, and cognitive architectures.
